priority_basis: Continue the newest authenticated Unicode identifier-admission line and close its explicitly recorded XID_Start/XID_Continue syntax gap before adding unrelated research.

completed.action: Add a fail-closed UAX #31 R1-1 syntax gate built from the already authenticated Unicode 17.0.0 DerivedCoreProperties bytes.

claim_boundaries.syntax_eligible: The NFC-normalized identifier satisfies XID_Start followed by XID_Continue under the pinned dataset.
claim_boundaries.profile_eligible: Every scalar satisfies the separately parsed Identifier_Status profile.
claim_boundaries.skeleton_unique: No registered identifier currently has the same authenticated confusable skeleton.
claim_boundaries.admissible: All three preceding decisions are true; this does not establish benign intent.

verification: Both new JavaScript files passed node --check before commit. The six-case runtime test suite is committed but was not executed because github.com DNS resolution was unavailable in the automation container.
handoff: Run node --test tools/frontier-research/unicode-identifier-syntax.test.mjs in CI or a fresh checkout, then test against full Unicode 17.0.0 data and UAX #31 conformance cases. The next security slice should address joining-control contexts or script restriction levels as a separate explicit gate.
shared_state_policy: Additive queue update only; canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and other teams' records were not overwritten.
